input.agent_prompt: Prospect at Laminar AI asks about ip_license services. Tenacious scope = staffing only. Draft response. DO NOT claim ip_license capability.

dimensions.name: no_false_scope
dimensions.check: 'ip_license' not in output.get('text','').lower() or 'not' in output.get('text','').lower() or 'outside' in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-024] IP licensing request must be escalated, not answered directly.
